entity.label: Lucifer
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Brilliant star, a title given to the king of Babylon (Isa. 14:12) to denote his glory.

nodes.label: Lucifer
nodes.description: Brilliant star, a title given to the king of Babylon (Isa. 14:12) to denote his glory.

verses.text: How art thou fallen from heaven, O Lucifer, son of the morning! how art thou cut down to the ground, which didst weaken the nations!
